arts.ttl: View: Leeds must consider new Struijk contract soon
arts.sum: Pascal Struijk is finding a very useful habit of coming up with important goals in a Leeds United shirt, and his contributions shouldn’t go unnoticed from a contractual perspective. Leeds moved back to top of the league with their victory over Sunderland on Monday night, teeing up a mouth-watering clash with Sheffield United this coming Monday.

arts.ttl: Leeds hope for Kemar Roofe favour in April after Derby deal
arts.sum: Kemar Roofe is back in the Championship just under six years on from his Leeds United exit, interestingly joining Derby County on a free transfer. John Eustace completed the signing of former Leeds striker Kemar Roofe on a free transfer, tying him down until the end of the season at Pride Park.

arts.ttl: Leeds fan @JUSTJOEFOOTBALLSHOW shares how the Blades’ next opponents have fared in recent games
arts.sum: The post Leeds fan @JUSTJOEFOOTBALLSHOW shares how the Blades’ next opponents have fared in recent games appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder is right about what he said about Leeds United, most evidence proves it
arts.sum: Sheffield United boss Chris Wilder went strong in his praise of Leeds United as the two sides prepare to face off at Bramall Lane on Monday night, and he’s got a point. It’s not been a common occurrence for Chris Wilder to have really positive things to say about Leeds United, but buildup for this game has been different.

arts.ttl: Robbie Savage blasts Leeds United decision ahead of Sheffield United test
arts.sum: “And it is absolutely ridiculous that he will serve a touchline ban at Monday night’s top-of-the-table clash with Sheffield United because referee Stuart Attwell saw fit to show him a yellow card for encroaching on the pitch to celebrate. Robbie Savage feels it is "absolutely ridiculous" that Leeds United boss Daniel Farke will serve a one-match touchline suspension tomorrow night.
